rationale: A relation symbol is fixed by membership in the signature's relation set (def:signature) together with its assigned arity (def:arity); 'relation symbol = R in R with ar(R)=n' parses on those two alone.
notes: The constructor role 'takes n terms and produces an atomic formula' names def:term (inputs) and def:atomic-formula (output). Treated as ambient elaboration of the symbol's role rather than load-bearing for its definition; candidate edges if the reviewer wants the input/output types surfaced (note the parallel call on def:signature-function-symbol).
